titleStmt.title: SII 6.729: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 729. (A.R. No. 256-A of 1899). ON A BEAM OVER THE SIXTH NICHE IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
taṁtasāni taṁtukuṁtuṟu narāsanisamarā A 1 dorapaseṭikētasani Aṁdikāpu A 1 mahāsvāḷu A 1 peruUlanijōgi gaṁdāḷi
narisuku 1 vīrivasana peṭina mōdālu 80 pulavuru AṟuIṁḍlavāru doṁḍā 1 māḷa lu 2 pratipalamu 1 kai ku 2 Iṁduku purāInayu
nicēta tōṁṭagaṭu vikrayamuga vilici peṭṭiri kaṟaluvaruku 1 . kummarulu ku 1 kōnikāṁ ḍru A 1 māṇikālumā 1 . Adamupaṭu
nu padumana sīmana I bōgānanu divyapaṭanu durgamarāṇi koḍku gaṁgādharajiyyanakunu mummaḍivārunu saUkapola
mu puṭaṁḍu 1 mōṭuṁbolāmu puṭaṁḍu 1 naṁbhyaḷuku jītamu cinalu 5 garakaḷiki jītaṁmu māḍa 1 patribaḍu jītamu ci 6 pa
ricarakula jītamu ci 4 bhōgana siṣṭajītamu 1 māhāsuvaḷuku jītāmu ci 12 Iṁtavaṭu jītalu bhaṁḍārana peṭaṁgalāru kilari jītanaku mummaḍivāḍānu pola
mu tu 10 kummarula jītānaku varivasananu Elakālānakunnu peṭina paiṁḍi māḍalu 5 kaṟalavāriki vīrivasāna peṭina mā 5 koni kārumāṇiku peṭina mā ka
garakaḷi vasananu caṁḍigōrā jītaṁ ci 4 . Akhaṁḍadīpānaku nityamunu neI Aḍaṁṭikai dēvara baṁḍarānaku padmanidhimāḍalu 50 peṭiri dīpapratima visyalu 16 I bhōgavēḷanu purāṇaṁ caduvanu baṁḍāranu padmanidhi mā 10 seṭi reṁḍu kuṁca .The inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 6.729 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
